hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */build/*|*/vendor/*|*/node_modules/*|*/output/*|*/dist/*) echo "Blocked: $f is in a generated/dependency directory. Edit source under src/ or inc/ instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in */src/*.js|*/src/*.jsx) [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac
